title: The Coward at the Crossroads
target: decide whether to hire the deserter loitering outside the chapel

contributions.line: Veska watches the deserter's hands tremble, noting the nervous flick of his eyes, and maintains her cold, calculating stare.
Imogen leans in slightly, her charming tone questioning his true reason for fleeing, trying to catch any inconsistency in his story.

outcomeNarrative: Imogen's calm probing uncovers the deserter's desperation, convincing the others he might not be as dangerous as he appears, leading to a favorable decision.
